summary: Corrected all local-store recovery messages/hints/tool-descriptions (tools.go, data_source.go, sync_hint.go, store.go) to state that blacklane has no syncable resources so data.db is not auto-populated (use live endpoint MCP tools), instead of referencing a non-existent 'sync' command or wrongly implying quote/watch populate it.
reason: Blacklane has no list-syncable resources (catalog=GET-by-slug, prices=POST), so Printing Press v4.28.0 omits the 'sync' command but still emits sync-recovery text and MCP sql/search tools over the generic resources store (data.db). data.db has no population path for blacklane; the quote ledger is a SEPARATE db (quote-ledger.db) read via the 'log' command, not MCP sql/search. Messages now tell agents the truth: no syncable resources, use live endpoints.
validated_outcome: go build + go vet + verify-skill clean; no residual 'blacklane-pp-cli sync' references in tools.go/data_source.go.
upstream_issue: generator emits sync-recovery messages even when no sync command is generated (no syncable resources); the internal/learn domain-neutral 'run sync to refresh entity lookups' text has the same latent issue
